Security levels 1–5 depending on parameters. Stateful hash-based (HSS/LMS); CNSA 2.0 required for firmware signing. W8 Winternitz parameter gives smallest signatures. State management critical — private key state must never be reused.

Security levels 1–5 depending on parameters. Stateful hash-based (eXtended Merkle Signature Scheme). SK size is implementation-dependent (liboqs reference). Same state management constraints as LMS. Limited number of signatures per key.
